content_body: We just returned from Serendipity and we loved it. We miss it already. The cabin has a wonderful spirit, and we felt right at home as soon as we got there. It is very well appointed and tastefully decorated. The owners provided so many thoughtful touches, from the commercial-grade appliances to all the neat spaces. That includes several oversized bedrooms, the game room, and our favorite, the Treehouse. We are already planning our next visit. Thank you for allowing us to enjoy your home.
title: "We miss it already!"
